kw.name: Evaluate
kw.doc: Evaluates the given expression in Python and returns the result.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Call Method
kw.doc: Calls the named method of the given object with the provided arguments.

kw.name: Create Webdriver
kw.msg: Creating an instance of the Chrome WebDriver.
kw.doc: Creates an instance of Selenium WebDriver.

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Set Selenium Speed
kw.doc: Sets the delay that is waited after each Selenium command.

Wait Until Page Contains
kw.doc: Waits until ``text`` appears on the current page.

kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Clear Element Text
kw.doc: Clears the value of the text-input-element identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.msg: Typing text 'jlim' into text field 'xpath=(//input[@placeholder="Enter Username"])[1]'.
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: Textfield with placeholder ${PLACEHOLDER} filled with value ${VALUE}
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Click Element
kw.msg:
ElementClickInterceptedException: Message: element click intercepted: Element
  • ...
    • is not clickable at point (602, 82). Other element would receive the click:
      ...
    (Session info: chrome=136.0.7103.114); For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#elementclickinterceptedexception Stacktrace: GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF61769CF45+75717] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF61769CFA0+75808] (No symbol) [0x00007FF617468F9A] (No symbol) [0x00007FF6174C7439] (No symbol) [0x00007FF6174C4DF2] (No symbol) [0x00007FF6174C1EA1] (No symbol) [0x00007FF6174C0DA1] (No symbol) [0x00007FF6174B2394] (No symbol) [0x00007FF6174E737A] (No symbol) [0x00007FF6174B1C46] (No symbol) [0x00007FF6174E7590] (No symbol) [0x00007FF61750F39C] (No symbol) [0x00007FF6174E7153] (No symbol) [0x00007FF6174B0421] (No symbol) [0x00007FF6174B11B3] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF61799D71D+3223453] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF617997CC2+3200322] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF6179B5AF3+3322739] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF6176B6A1A+180890] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF6176BE11F+211359] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF6176A5294+109332] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF6176A5442+109762] GetHandleVerifier [0x00007FF61768BA59+4825] BaseThreadInitThunk [0x00007FFE03107374+20] RtlUserThreadStart [0x00007FFE033FCC91+33]

kw.name: Validate Replace Shift In User Login

test.doc: End-to-end flow: Login → Beeway → Replace Shift

kw.name: Close All Browsers
kw.doc: Closes all open browsers and resets the browser cache.
